module_description: Monitors disk space usage on configured partitions and alerts when usage exceeds the configured percentage threshold.

hints.threads: Number of partitions to check in parallel.
hints.alert: Usage threshold (%). An alert is triggered when disk usage exceeds this value. Overrides the module-level threshold for this partition.
hints.partition: Mountpoint or drive letter to monitor (e.g. / or C:\). Filled by discovery.
hints.label: Display name shown in Modules, the status page and notifications (e.g. "host - /"). Editable; defaults from discovery.
hints.enabled: Enable or disable monitoring for this partition.

rename_item_prompt: Enter new partition path (e.g. / or C:\):

ui.discover_error: Could not load the list of mounted partitions
